pro_brother.song_name: I Want To Know What Love Is

content:
[Intro]

[ch]Em[/ch] '' [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] ''' [ch]C[/ch] ' [ch]Em[/ch] '' [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] '''


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I've gotta take a little time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
A little time to think things over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I better read between the lines[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
In case I need it when I'm older[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Now this mountain I must climb[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Feels like the world upon my shoulders[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Through the clouds I see love shine[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
It keeps me warm as life grows colder[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
In my life there's been heartache and pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
I don't know if I can face it again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Can't stop now I've travelled so far[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
To change this lonely life[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I want to know what love is[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I want you to show me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I want to feel what love is[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
I know you can show me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna take a little time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
A little time to look around me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I've got nowhere left to hide[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
It looks like love has finally found me[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
In my life there's been heartache and pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
I don't know if I can face it again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Can't stop now I've travelled so far[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
To change this lonely life[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I want to know what love is[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I want you to show me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I want to feel what love is[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
I know you can show me[/tab]
